faq.title: Still Curious? Find Your Answers Below

items.q: 1. How is this different from other task management tools?
items.a: Our tool blends modern design with advanced workflow automation, intuitive scheduling, and real-time team insights — giving you control without complexity.

items.q: 2. Do I need technical skills to use this platform?
items.a: Our platform combines simplicity with powerful features like real-time collaboration, smart task organization, and seamless integrations — all in a clean, intuitive interface.

items.q: 3. Can I invite team members to my workspace?
items.a: Yes — you can easily invite teammates to collaborate in real time, assign roles, share updates, and manage projects together — all within one unified workspace.

items.q: 4. What happens if I reach the limit of my plan?
items.a: When you reach your plan's limit, you'll still keep full access to your existing data, but advanced features, extra seats, and premium automation will pause until you upgrade or adjust your workspace.

items.q: 5. Do you offer a trial for premium features?
items.a: Yes — you can explore all premium tools free for a limited time, including advanced reporting, custom workflows, and priority support access — no credit card required.
